title: Gradeup Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Gradeup Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Gradeup Ventures Solutions family as a Subject Matter Expert in Visakhapatnam. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Gradeup Ventures Solutions:
Gradeup Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gradeup Ventures Solutions!
